case_title: TRI-CITY DENTAL SERVICES VS J.C. LUKRICH AND COMPANY, CPA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-16-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF DEC-03-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRI-CITY DENTAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT J.C. LUKRICH AND COMPANY, CPA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRI-CITY DENTAL SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT J.C. LUKRICH AND COMPANY, CPA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
